source.title: BSEE Accident Investigation Report - Casing Failure, VR-279 Well A3/A3D

event.incident_type: Casing Failure with Oil and Gas Release
actions_taken: Production operator discovered gas and oil leaking during morning rounds
Well shut-in and casing pressure monitored
Pump through plugs set in short string and long string tubing
Leak diagnostic tests performed using Sondex Memory Leak Detection tool
Pack-off isolation assemblies installed to isolate holes in short string tubing
Long string tubing perforated below dual packer to produce 10,800ft sand
Zonal isolation and temporary abandonment approved for diagnostics
event.summary: On 19-June-2015 at 0605 hours, a production operator on platform VR-279 discovered gas and oil leaking from well A3/A3D through a hole in the 20 inch drive pipe at the +10 bell guide and from the 20 inch x 10 3/4 inch annulus below the wellhead base plate. Approximately 0.67 gallons of oil leaked into the Gulf of Mexico. Root cause analysis determined that a gas compressor failure on 16-June-2015 caused production shutdown, allowing reservoir shut-in pressure to build. This pressure caused pump through plugs to fail, allowing gas and oil to enter deteriorated short string tubing, then the 7 5/8 inch production casing, and finally the 10 3/4 inch surface casing, which had a leak approximately 10 feet below the wellhead. The surface casing leak allowed pressurized fluids to enter the non-pressure-containing 20 inch drive pipe, creating open leak paths to the atmosphere.

threats.name: Pump Through Plug Failure Due to Pressure Buildup
Short String Tubing Deterioration and Integrity Loss
Surface Casing Burst Due to Pressure Exceeding Rating
Gas Compressor Mechanical Failure Causing Production Shutdown

consequences.name: Oil and Gas Release to Environment

controls.name: Casing Pressure Monitoring and Bleed-Off Procedures
controls.barrier_role: Detect and relieve sustained casing pressure to prevent buildup
controls.lod_basis: Routine monitoring and pressure relief are primary controls to prevent pressure accumulation

supporting_text: Casing pressure was bled to zero and monitored
Casing pressure diagnostics were performed on 27-Jan-2015. The pressure at the beginning of the bleed off was 1,250psi and could not be bled to zero psi
The monthly casing pressure recordings remained at or below 100psi

controls.name: Pump Through Plug Installation
controls.barrier_role: Isolate tubing strings to prevent pressure communication and sustained casing pressure
controls.lod_basis: Mechanical isolation of tubing strings is a primary engineering control to prevent sustained casing pressure

supporting_text: pump through plugs were set at 12,802ft wire-line measured depth (WLM) and 13,202ft WLM in the SS and LS tubing respectively
The buildup of reservoir shut-in pressure caused the pump through plugs set at 12,820ft WLM and 12,821ft WLM in SS to fail allowing reservoir shut-in pressure/gas and oil to enter the deteriorated SS

controls.name: Leak Detection and Diagnostic Testing
controls.barrier_role: Identify casing and tubing leaks to enable timely repair and prevent pressure buildup
controls.lod_basis: Diagnostic testing is a secondary control to detect integrity issues before they lead to loss of containment

supporting_text: Leak diagnostic test were performed to locate the leak in the SS tubing
On 31-Dec-2014, a Sondex Memory Leak Detection tool was run and holes were located in the SS tubing at 8,009ft, 11,960ft, and 11,974ft

controls.name: Pack-Off Isolation Assembly Installation
controls.barrier_role: Isolate identified holes in tubing to restore pressure integrity
controls.lod_basis: Mechanical isolation of tubing defects is a secondary engineering control to restore barrier integrity

supporting_text: Approval was obtained on 01-Jan-2015, to set pack-off isolation assemblies across the holes in the SS tubing
In March of 2015, attempts to isolate the leaks in the SS tubing with pack-off isolation assembly failed

controls.name: Application to Modify (APM) Approval Process
controls.barrier_role: Ensure engineering changes and well interventions are properly reviewed and approved before implementation
controls.lod_basis: Management of change and approval processes are primary administrative controls to prevent uncontrolled well operations

supporting_text: An Application to Modify (APM) was approved on 29-Aug 2014
An APM was approved on 10-Sep-2014
an APM was approved on 09-Dec-2014
Approval was obtained on 01-Jan-2015

controls.name: Production Operator Morning Rounds and Visual Inspection
controls.barrier_role: Detect gas and oil leaks through visual observation during routine platform inspections
controls.lod_basis: Visual inspection by operations personnel is a tertiary detection control to identify active leaks

supporting_text: A production operator was making his morning rounds and found gas and oil leaking from the A3/A3D well

controls.name: Casing Material Selection and Pressure Rating Verification
controls.barrier_role: Ensure casing materials have adequate burst pressure ratings for expected operating conditions
controls.lod_basis: Proper material selection and pressure rating verification is a primary engineering control to prevent casing burst

supporting_text: 10 3/4 inch 45.5ppf K-55casing has an internal burst rating of 3,580psi
The last highest shut-in tubing pressure for the SS was recorded at +-3500psi on 27-Jan-2015
BSEE determined the leak in the 10 3/4 inch surface casing +-10ft below the well head may have been caused by exceeding the internal burst rating of 3,580psi

controls.name: Casing Corrosion Protection and Fluid Compatibility Management
controls.barrier_role: Prevent casing material degradation from exposure to corrosive wellbore fluids
controls.lod_basis: Material protection and fluid management are primary engineering controls to maintain casing integrity

supporting_text: BSEE determined that the 7 5/8 inch production casing may have been weakened by contacting corrosive wellbore fluids from past instances of sustained casing pressure

controls.name: Gas Compressor Preventive Maintenance and Reliability Program
controls.barrier_role: Maintain gas compressor mechanical reliability to prevent production shutdown and pressure buildup
controls.lod_basis: Equipment maintenance is a primary administrative control to prevent equipment failure that triggers pressure buildup

supporting_text: On the 16-Jun-2015 the gas compressor on VR-279 started experiencing mechanical issues leading to significant down time

controls.name: Contingency Production Planning During Equipment Downtime
controls.barrier_role: Maintain production flow during equipment maintenance to prevent reservoir pressure buildup
controls.lod_basis: Alternative production pathways are secondary controls to mitigate consequences of equipment failure

supporting_text: During this down time the A3D well had little to no production. This down time of production allowed the reservoir sand at 10,800ft shut-in pressure to build

notes.rules: JSON output only. mentioned fields must be evidence-based. Use null for unknown values.
